message:
✨ fix ACMM leaderboard scores, add GA4 tracking & badge filter (#1511)

Score fixes:
- Fix criteria counts: 65 total, 34 scannable (was incorrectly showing 26)
- Score bar now shows x/N where N = cumulative scannable for that level
  (e.g., L2 projects show x/11, L5 shows x/28) instead of universal x/26
- Sort by level now breaks ties by score desc, then alphabetical
- Per-level scannable counts derived from acmm.ts source of truth

Filters:
- Add ✨ Badge Participants filter chip (shows 7 projects with ACMM badge)
- Level filter + badge filter can combine
- Clear filters button when any filter is active

GA4 Analytics (measurement ID G-PXWNVQ8D1T, same as console):
- Add gtag.js to docs site globally via layout
- Track: acmm_scan_click, acmm_repo_click, acmm_search,
  acmm_level_filter, acmm_badge_filter, acmm_sort_change,
  acmm_info_toggle, acmm_dashboard_click, acmm_paper_click

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
